'''tamopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeese|zeese]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeese|zeese]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tamopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmepeth|tæmepeth]] || [[word:tæmepej|tæmepej]] || [[word:tæmepesh|tæmepesh]] || [[word:tæmepe|tæmepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamomopoth|tamomopoth]] || [[word:tamomopoj|tamomopoj]] || [[word:tamomoposh|tamomoposh]] || [[word:tamomopo|tamomopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamopoth|tamopoth]] || [[word:tamopoj|tamopoj]] || [[word:tamoposh|tamoposh]] || [[word:tamopo|tamopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamofpoth|tamofpoth]] || [[word:tamofpoj|tamofpoj]] || [[word:tamofposh|tamofposh]] || [[word:tamofpof|tamofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamopotho|tamopotho]] || [[word:tamopojo|tamopojo]] || [[word:tamoposho|tamoposho]] || [[word:tamopoko|tamopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamopoth|tamopoth]] || [[word:tamopoj|tamopoj]] || [[word:tamoposh|tamoposh]] || [[word:tamopo|tamopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamopothol|tamopothol]] || [[word:tamopojol|tamopojol]] || [[word:tamoposhol|tamoposhol]] || [[word:tamopokol|tamopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamopothotho|tamopothotho]] || [[word:tamopojojo|tamopojojo]] || [[word:tamoposhosho|tamoposhosho]] || [[word:tamopoko|tamopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamopothon|tamopothon]] || [[word:tamopojon|tamopojon]] || [[word:tamoposhon|tamoposhon]] || [[word:tamopokon|tamopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamopothoro|tamopothoro]] || [[word:tamopojoro|tamopojoro]] || [[word:tamoposhoro|tamoposhoro]] || [[word:tamopokoro|tamopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
